summary: Frontend-only E2E verification of v3 step-2 simulation modeling features on https://eval-probability.preview.emergentagent.com (viewport 1600x1000). All 15 review checkpoints verified. Mode selector (SIMPLE/BOOTSTRAP) radio cards present with SIMPLE default. All 4 collapsible sections (section-pnl, section-mae, section-costs, section-behavioral) present with toggles; section-pnl opens by default with all 7 strat-* fields + btn-open-csv visible. Bootstrap flow works end-to-end: paste 33 rows → bootstrap-parse → bootstrap-summary shows total=33, WR 48.5%, 16W/17L, μwin=+309, μloss=-115, best=+892, worst=-340, MAE=no, autocorr=-0.68, plus a visible '⚠ recommend ≥ 100' warning text below. INTRADAY RISK: mae-mode-estimate default + strat-instrument dropdown has all 7 expected values [nq,es,cl,gc,eurusd,gbpusd,custom]; mae-mode-manual reveals the 4 MAE fields; mae-mode-auto is correctly DISABLED when bootstrap has no MAE column. COSTS: costs-mode-none default; costs-mode-estimate reveals strat-commrt/strat-tradesday/strat-contracts; costs-mode-fixed reveals strat-dailycomm. BEHAVIORAL: behav-post-conservative default, switches to aggressive, behav-mindays-winning reveals strat-windaythresh, behav-maxdays-calendar present. IGNITE in BOOTSTRAP mode with daily commission=$40: auto-switches to ORACLE, kpi-ppass renders numeric (0.19%, not NaN), chart-attempt-curve renders with attempts x-axis [1,2,3,5,7,10,15,20,25,30,40,50] + 50/75/95/99% milestones, kpi-commissions panel shows daily -$40 / per-attempt -$1,036 / 17.3% of target. Zero JS console errors through full flow. ES↔EN language toggle works (section labels 'P&L DISTRIBUTION' etc. intentionally identical to v3 abbreviation convention). No critical bugs found.

issues: The '⚠ recommend ≥ 100 · you have fewer samples' text renders correctly below bootstrap-summary, but there is no dedicated data-testid='bootstrap-min-warning' wrapper. Adding the testid would make this warning independently selectable for future regression tests. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Wrap the sub-100 warning line in a span with data-testid="bootstrap-min-warning" so the warning can be asserted directly (currently only findable via text match).
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is now 2,285 lines (up from 1,875 in v3). Carrying forward the previously-raised concern: modularization into /components/Strategy/ (ModeSelector, Collapsible, BootstrapInput, IntradayRiskSection, CostsSection, BehavioralSection) and /components/Oracle/ (AttemptCurveChart, CommissionImpactPanel) would substantially improve maintainability. Non-blocking.

monteCarlo.js grew from previous iteration to 447 lines — genDay/simulateSinglePhase/parseBootstrapData are all cohesive, but extracting BOOTSTRAP sampling and INSTRUMENT_MAE_RATIOS into small sibling modules (bootstrap.js, instruments.js) would help testing each in isolation.

Consider adding data-testid attributes to the bootstrap sub-100 warning line, to the daily-cost preview line in the ESTIMATE commission sub-panel, and to each AttemptCurve bar so stats can be introspected by tests without relying on innerText substring matches.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3 step-2 simulation modeling features verified. Key validations (firm-apex_eod → first plan → btn-next-strategy → Strategy tab): (1) mode-selector with mode-simple (default checked) + mode-bootstrap radios. (2) 4 collapsibles: section-pnl (default open), section-mae, section-costs, section-behavioral, each with {testId}-toggle. (3) BOOTSTRAP flow: fill bootstrap-textarea with newline-separated P&Ls → click bootstrap-parse → bootstrap-summary renders. With 33 samples: summary reads 'total days: 33, WR 48.5%, wins:16, losses:17, μ win 309, μ loss -115, best +892, worst -340, MAE column: no, autocorr -0.68' + '⚠ recommend ≥ 100' warning below. (4) INTRADAY RISK: strat-instrument <select> has options [nq,es,cl,gc,eurusd,gbpusd,custom]; mae-mode-auto INPUT.disabled=true when bootstrap has no MAE column. (5) COSTS with fixed commission=40 → IGNITE in bootstrap → pane-oracle shows kpi-commissions panel with daily -$40 / per-attempt -$1,036 / 17.3% of target. (6) chart-attempt-curve ALWAYS renders with x-axis labels '1 2 3 5 7 10 15 20 25 30 40 50' and four milestone rows '50% / 75% / 95% / 99% CHANCE'. (7) kpi-commissions is correctly HIDDEN when commission=0. (8) Zero JS console errors across the full flow. (9) firm-custom + SIMPLE + no commission produced P(PASS)=55.69%, EV +$1,337 — higher than the 15-35% envelope mentioned in the review request, BUT this is driven by the firm-custom STRATEGY_DEFAULTS (WR=0.37, muWin=$438, muLoss=-$194 ⇒ EV/trade≈$40) and not a regression of the engine; specific Apex 50K Intraday plans may sit in-range. No engine fault detected.

passed: tab-strategy renders ModeSelector with mode-simple (default) and mode-bootstrap radio cards
section-pnl (default open), section-mae, section-costs, section-behavioral all present with {id}-toggle controls
In SIMPLE mode section-pnl shows strat-wr / strat-muwin / strat-sigmawin / strat-muloss / strat-sigmaloss / strat-tailprob / strat-tailmult + btn-open-csv
Clicking mode-bootstrap swaps P&L panel to BootstrapInput with bootstrap-textarea + bootstrap-parse + bootstrap-paste
Paste 33 P&Ls + parse → bootstrap-summary shows total=33, WR 48.5%, 16W/17L, μwin=+309, μloss=-115, best +892, worst -340, MAE: no, autocorr=-0.68
sub-100 warning text '⚠ recommend ≥ 100 · you have fewer samples. results will be noisy.' visible below summary
IGNITE in BOOTSTRAP mode runs without error, auto-switches to pane-oracle, kpi-ppass = 0.19% (numeric, not NaN)
section-mae-toggle opens INTRADAY RISK; mae-mode-estimate default-checked; strat-instrument dropdown has options [nq,es,cl,gc,eurusd,gbpusd,custom]
mae-mode-manual reveals strat-maewinmean / strat-maewinstd / strat-maelossmean / strat-maelossstd
mae-mode-auto input.disabled=true when bootstrap data lacks MAE column
section-costs-toggle: costs-mode-none default; costs-mode-estimate reveals strat-commrt + strat-tradesday + strat-contracts; costs-mode-fixed reveals strat-dailycomm
With commission=40 and IGNITE, kpi-commissions panel shows daily -$40 / per-attempt -$1,036 / 17.3% of target
section-behavioral-toggle: behav-post-conservative default; behav-post-aggressive switches; behav-mindays-winning reveals strat-windaythresh; behav-maxdays-calendar present
chart-attempt-curve always visible on ORACLE tab with attempts axis [1,2,3,5,7,10,15,20,25,30,40,50] and 4 milestone rows (50%/75%/95%/99%)
ES ↔ EN language toggle works; section labels intentionally consistent across locales (per v3 convention)
Zero JavaScript console errors throughout the full new-feature flow
observations: firm-custom + SIMPLE + NONE commissions produced P(PASS)=55.69%, EV +$1,337 — outside the 15-35% envelope mentioned in the request. Driven by custom STRATEGY_DEFAULTS (EV/trade ≈ $40), not an engine regression.
bootstrap-min-warning has no dedicated data-testid — selectable only via text match.

rca of the issue: N/A — all new v3 step-2 simulation-modeling features render and integrate cleanly; engine outputs (P(PASS), EV, attempt curve, commission impact) are numeric and finite; no bugs reproduced.
